case_title: THOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS VS. JOSE A. VENEGAS

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,913.46 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY ON 08/18/2018. AS TO DEFENDANT VENEGAS, JOSE A.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,695.02 FILED BY THOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT VENEGAS, JOSE A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $45.00) SERVED MAY-13-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VENEGAS, JOSE A.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT VENEGAS, JOSE A.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2018 - CONTINUED TO JUN-22-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS' REPRESENTATIVE: MARCOS PENA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2018 BY VISITING JUDGE PAUL ALVARADO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, REPRESENTED BY MARCOS PENA, MANAGER. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: PAUL ALVARADO; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VENEGAS, JOSE A. $1,695.02 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,790.02 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-04-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
